subject: [PATCH v2 8/9] nfsd: hold net namespace reference for delayed-dispose nfsd_files

2026-06-02.patch_summary: This patch fixes a use-after-free bug in the NFS server by ensuring that a reference to the network namespace is held until an nfsd_file is fully disposed of. The patch introduces a new flag NFSD_FILE_NET_HELD to track whether an nfsd_file holds a net reference, and modifies the nfsd_file_free function to release this reference before freeing the file. Additionally, it moves the call to put_net in nfsd_file_put_local to ensure that the net reference is released before the file reference, preventing potential stale pointer issues.
